notes: Operator spot-checked 3795 Mount Olive Rd, Adkins (DOC_NUMBER 20260600092) against the live maps.bexar.org/foreclosures map UI and confirmed the record matches. First adapter (scrapers/foreclosure_notices_map.py) produces 288 normalized raw records across two ArcGIS layers (273 mortgage + 15 tax). 9/9 fixture test cases pass. parser_confidence is 95 for every record; 0 missing DOC_NUMBER or ADDRESS.

doc_type_granularity.decision: Option (a): treat all Mortgage-layer rows as canonical NOTICE_OF_SUBSTITUTE_TRUSTEE_SALE. Tax-layer rows -> TAX_FORECLOSURE_NOTICE.
doc_type_granularity.deferred: Cross-link to bexar.tx.publicsearch.us by DOC_NUMBER to recover specific instrument doc-type (NSTS vs NOS vs NOD) -- deferred to a later phase.
doc_type_granularity.rationale: Accept classification imprecision for v1 in exchange for fast time-to-leads.

cross_county_leakage.decision: Phase 4 parcel-matcher should flag non-Bexar municipality records as REVIEW_REQUIRED with review_flag 'potential_cross_county_leak'. Do NOT drop silently.
cross_county_leakage.implementation_phase: Phase 3 production-ingest applies the flag now (so Phase 3 dashboard already labels these correctly); Phase 4 parcel-matcher confirms via BCAD ownership lookup.

sale_date_precision.decision: Derive expected_sale_date = first Tuesday of recording_month. Per Tex. Prop. Code Sec. 51.002, non-judicial trustee sales fall on the first Tuesday of each month; the framework's expected_sale_date should reflect that statute.
sale_date_precision.fallback: If first-Tuesday falls on Jan 1 or July 4, shift to first-Wednesday (also per the statute).

dashboard_framing.decision: Dashboard surfaces this as 'upcoming foreclosure sales (rolling 60-90 day window)' not 'all Bexar foreclosures.'
dashboard_framing.deferred: Historical deeds-upon-trustee-sale post-sale records -- deferred to clerk_recordings (bexar.tx.publicsearch.us) integration in a later phase.
